findings.description: badge.tsx default variant uses bg-zinc-50/text-zinc-900 without dark: override — pre-existing, not introduced in v150
SummaryCard onMouseLeave sets hardcoded boxShadow string instead of CSS var — minor inconsistency

summary: v150 UX fixes are clean and correct. Health badge variants now have proper dark mode support (destructive/success/warning all have dark: overrides). ProviderLogo renders colored icon backgrounds with correct rgba values per provider. Sidebar section headers (Autoscaling, Access Control, Clusters) use text-slate-500 dark:text-slate-300 — visible in both modes. FilterBar uses CSS variables throughout. Zero-state logic in SummaryCard correctly uses muted color when values are 0. No regressions introduced. Two LOW findings are pre-existing and do not block approval.
